title: cymbidium cyperifolium var. szechuanicum
intro: Cymbidium cyperifolium var. szechuanicum, also known as the Szechuan orchid or Szechuan lilyturf, is a plant species of the orchid family. It is used in traditional Chinese medicine, valued for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral effects. The plant is believed to have health benefits such as reducing fever, treating respiratory infections, and relieving pain, and is often used to treat various conditions, including coughs, bronchitis, and pneumonia. In traditional herbal preparations, the plant is typically used in the form of a decoction or infusion, made by steeping the roots or leaves in hot water to create a medicinal tea.
